```kotlin
this.treeNext.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
```

When we have a class without a body followed by blank lines at the end of the file, `this.treeNext` can be `null`, causing the NPE when trying to call `elementType` on it.

The fix should check if `treeNext` is not null before accessing its `elementType`.

12→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
13→
14→public class NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule : StandardRule("no-consecutive-blank-lines") {
15→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
16→        node: ASTNode,
17→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
18→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
19→    ) {
20→        if (node is PsiWhiteSpace &&
21→            node.prevSibling != null
22→        ) {
23→            val text = node.getText()
24→            val newLineCount = text.count { it == '\n' }
25→            if (newLineCount < 2) {
26→                return
27→            }
28→
29→            val eof = node.nextLeaf() == null
30→            val betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor = node.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()
31→
32→            if (newLineCount > 2 || eof || betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
33→                val split = text.split("\n")
34→                val offset =
35→                    node.startOffset +
36→                        split[0].length +
37→                        split[1].length +
38→                        if (betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
39→                            1
40→                        } else {
41→                            2
42→                        }
43→                emit(offset, "Needless blank line(s)", true)
44→                if (autoCorrect) {
45→                    val newText =
46→                        buildString {
47→                            append(split.first())
48→                            append("\n")
49→                            if (!eof && !betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
50→                                append("\n")
51→                            }
52→                            append(split.last())
53→                        }
54→                    (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(newText)
55→                }
56→            }
57→        }
58→    }
59→
60→    private fun ASTNode.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor() =
61→        prevCodeLeaf()
62→            ?.let { prevNode ->
63→                prevNode.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
64→                    prevNode.treeParent.elementType == CLASS &&
65→                    this.treeNext?.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
66→            }
67→            ?: false
68→}
69→
70→public val NO_CONSECUTIVE_BLANK_LINES_RULE_ID: RuleId = NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule().ruleId
71→

            """.trimIndent()

    }

    }

All tests pass. Let me summarize the fix:

## Summary

The issue was a NullPointerException in the `NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule` when processing a file containing a class without a body followed by consecutive blank lines at the end of the file.

### Root cause
In the `isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()` method at line 65, the code was calling:
```kotlin
this.treeNext.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
```

When there's a class without a body (like `sealed class Hello`) followed by blank lines at EOF, `this.treeNext` is `null` because there's no more tokens after the whitespace. Calling `.elementType` on `null` causes the NPE.

### Fix
Changed `this.treeNext.elementType` to `this.treeNext?.elementType` on line 65. This makes the null-safe call return `null` when `treeNext` is null, and the comparison with `PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR` will evaluate to `false` (as intended), avoiding the NPE.

The fix is minimal, targeted, and doesn't break any existing functionality.

content.text:
The fix has been successfully applied and all tests pass. Let me provide a summary of the fix:

## Summary

### Issue
A `NullPointerException` was thrown when ktlint processed a file containing a class without a body followed by consecutive blank lines at the end of the file (e.g., `sealed class Hello\n\n\n`).

### Root Cause
In the `isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()` method in `NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt` (line 65), the code was calling:
```kotlin
this.treeNext.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
```

When there's a class without a body followed by blank lines at EOF, `this.treeNext` is `null` because there are no more tokens after the whitespace. Calling `.elementType` on `null` caused the NPE.

### Fix
Changed `this.treeNext.elementType` to `this.treeNext?.elementType` (added the safe call operator `?`). This makes the null-safe call return `null` when `treeNext` is null, and the comparison with `PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR` will evaluate to `false` (as intended), avoiding the NPE.

### Changes Made
1. **`ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/main/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule.kt`**: 
   - Line 65: Changed `this.treeNext.elementType` to `this.treeNext?.elementType`

2. **Created new test file** `ktlint-ruleset-standard/src/test/kotlin/com/pinterest/ktlint/ruleset/standard/rules/NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleClassWithoutBodyTest.kt` to verify the fix works for:
   - Sealed class without body followed by consecutive blank lines
   - Regular class without body followed by consecutive blank lines
   - Abstract class without body followed by consecutive blank lines
   - Data class with primary constructor but no body followed by consecutive blank lines

All existing tests continue to pass with this fix.

14→public class NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule : StandardRule("no-consecutive-blank-lines") {
15→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
16→        node: ASTNode,
17→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
18→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
19→    ) {
20→        if (node is PsiWhiteSpace &&
21→            node.prevSibling != null
22→        ) {
23→            val text = node.getText()
24→            val newLineCount = text.count { it == '\n' }
25→            if (newLineCount < 2) {
26→                return
27→            }
28→
29→            val eof = node.nextLeaf() == null
30→            val betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor = node.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor()
31→
32→            if (newLineCount > 2 || eof || betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
33→                val split = text.split("\n")
34→                val offset =
35→                    node.startOffset +
36→                        split[0].length +
37→                        split[1].length +
38→                        if (betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
39→                            1
40→                        } else {
41→                            2
42→                        }
43→                emit(offset, "Needless blank line(s)", true)
44→                if (autoCorrect) {
45→                    val newText =
46→                        buildString {
47→                            append(split.first())
48→                            append("\n")
49→                            if (!eof && !betweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor) {
50→                                append("\n")
51→                            }
52→                            append(split.last())
53→                        }
54→                    (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(newText)
55→                }
56→            }
57→        }
58→    }
59→
60→    private fun ASTNode.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor() =
61→        prevCodeLeaf()
62→            ?.let { prevNode ->
63→                prevNode.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
64→                    prevNode.treeParent.elementType == CLASS &&
65→                    this.treeNext.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
66→            }
67→            ?: false
68→}
69→
70→public val NO_CONSECUTIVE_BLANK_LINES_RULE_ID: RuleId = NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule().ruleId

import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.KtLintAssertThat.Companion.assertThatRule
import com.pinterest.ktlint.test.LintViolation
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test

/**
 * Tests for issue: NPE on consecutive blank lines in end of file with class without body
 * https://github.com/pinterest/ktlint/issues/XXXX
 */
class NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleClassWithoutBodyTest {
    private val noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat = assertThatRule { NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule() }

    @Test
    fun `Given a sealed class without body followed by consecutive blank lines at EOF should not throw NPE`() {
        val code =
            """
            sealed class Hello


            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            sealed class Hello

            """.trimIndent()
        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(3, 1, "Needless blank line(s)")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }

    @Test
    fun `Given a class without body followed by consecutive blank lines at EOF should not throw NPE`() {
        val code =
            """
            class Hello


            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            class Hello

            """.trimIndent()
        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(3, 1, "Needless blank line(s)")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }

    @Test
    fun `Given an abstract class without body followed by consecutive blank lines at EOF should not throw NPE`() {
        val code =
            """
            abstract class Hello


            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            abstract class Hello

            """.trimIndent()
        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(3, 1, "Needless blank line(s)")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }

    @Test
    fun `Given a data class with primary constructor but no body followed by consecutive blank lines at EOF`() {
        val code =
            """
            data class Hello(val name: String)


            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            data class Hello(val name: String)

            """.trimIndent()
        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(3, 1, "Needless blank line(s)")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }
}
"}
